subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Him Who hath manifested Himself and revealed that which hath attracted the hearts of them that are endued with understanding, and hath sent down the Book as a token of His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من ظهر و اظهر ما انجذبت به افئده اولی الالباب و انزل الکتاب فضلا من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @law of Huququ'llah, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
